task_objective: Update SDH-ludusavi to pyludusavi 0.2.3 and use the new Ludusavi env constructor argument.
design_decisions: Kept flatpak_id explicit so the plugin targets the Ludusavi Flatpak deterministically.
Replaced the SDH executor proxy with pyludusavi 0.2.3's env constructor argument.
Passed LD_LIBRARY_PATH as an empty override when present because pyludusavi merges overrides onto os.environ.
Shared the same environment helper between adapter construction and launcher command discovery.
results: Targeted tests for Ludusavi adapter, discovery, launcher, protocol, and package behavior passed after the update.
